item.title: Today, several new laws come into force in Norway. One of these is a duty to label retouched advertising.
item.description:
NOW RETAILED ADVERTISEMENT MUST BE MARKED From today, advertisements and sponsored posts must be marked if they contain people who have had their skin or body shape changed. The mark itself is a visible white circle with the text «retouched person».
WANTS TO AVOID BODY PRESSURE According to Ministry of Children and Families Kjersti Toppe (Sp), the purpose of the new requirement is to counteract body pressure and unnatural body ideals. - You should be aware of what is not natural, Toppe told VG earlier in June.
CLEAR FEEDBACK FROM YOUNG PEOPLE Norway is one of the first countries in the world to introduce a requirement for the labeling of retouched advertising. According to the Minister, the new rule should actually have several exceptions. But thanks to clear feedback from young people in the consultation round, the exceptions were scrapped.
STRICTER REQUIREMENTS FOR COSMETIC INTERVENTIONS Fighting body pressure is the purpose of another new decision. Competence requirements have now been introduced to carry out certain forms of cosmetic procedures, injections and treatment. An age limit of 18 years has also been introduced for such non-medical interventions. Source: https://www.vg.no/nyheter/innenriks/i/g6oP50/dette-skjer-i-dag?fbclid=IwAR30SGK81MWSnEYfCNvoA-8OlnIPp3mo8xLJMTrPFA7IKEDz4wCJRqVqb4Y
item.dc:creator: NaV3P

item.title: Every American Must Read This
item.description: https://twitter.com/Thom_Hartmann/status/1543079225254559744 This really is it people. This is the case that decides if America is a democracy or not. It’s the Endgame. And at least 3 of those scumbuckets have already expressed approval of it. It’s safe to assume that they’ll all support it. The November midterms really are your last opportunity to stop them.

item.title: The opportunity to have your rapists baby. When you are 10.
item.description: https://www.washingtonpost.com/nation/2022/04/29/ohio-rape-bill-opportunity/ She was referred from a child abuse expert in Ohio to a gynecologist in Indiana for an abortion procedure. https://news.yahoo.com/ohio-restricts-abortions-10-old-172452857.html So naturally the Christofascist right are busy making traveling across state lines for an abortion illegal. https://www.webmd.com/women/news/20220630/abortion-opponents-dont-want-patients-crossing-state-lines

item.dc:creator: WolfWoodPress

item.title: This could actually happen in the US...
item.description:
"In 1966, the leader of Romania, Nicolae Ceausescu, outlawed access to abortion and contraception in a bid to boost the country’s population. In the short term, it worked, and the year after it was enacted the average number of children born to Romanian women jumped from 1.9 to 3.7. But birthrates quickly fell again as women found ways around the ban. Wealthy, urban women were sometimes able to bribe doctors to perform abortions, or they had contraceptive IUDs smuggled in from Germany. Romania’s prohibition of the procedure was disproportionately felt by low-income women and disadvantaged groups. Many Romanian women turned to home and back-alley abortions, and by 1989, an estimated 10,000 women had died as a result of unsafe procedures. The real number of deaths might have been much higher, as women who sought abortions and those who helped them faced years of imprisonment if caught. Maternal mortality skyrocketed, doubling between 1965 and 1989." https://foreignpolicy.com/2019/05/16/what-actually-happens-when-a-country-bans-abortion-romania-alabama/
"Another consequence of Romania’s abortion ban was that hundreds of thousands of children were turned over to state orphanages. When communism collapsed in Romania in 1989, an estimated 170,000 children were found warehoused in filthy orphanages. Having previously been hidden from the world, images emerged of stick-thin children, many of whom had been beaten and abused. Some were left shackled to metal bed frames."
If you can stomach it, here is another article where a survivor of a Romanian orphanage recounts his experience and it's truly horrific: https://www.theatlantic.com/magazine/archive/2020/07/can-an-unloved-child-learn-to-love/612253/ If you think it can't get this bad in the United States, it sure as shit can. Please vote. If you have the means, please donate to an abortion fund: https://abortionfunds.org/ https://keepourclinics.org/
item.dc:creator: LobstahSoul

item.title: The country is destroying democracy, and I have been diagnosed with heart failure from Covid. Great.
item.description: I had been struggling to keep up at my job physically, I just thought that I was just pushing myself too hard. But no matter what I did I just felt like I was always losing ground. I started eating less meat, cut out soda, worked to be more active. And then a month ago I started having episodes of rapid heart rate without any trigger. Went to the ER thinking it would be something minor. No. I have heart failure, likely caused by the Covid I got from a mask denying coworker in 2020. If I can’t keep my job, I will lose my insurance. I’ll lose my place to live, as my housing is tied to my job. I’m trying to keep my head up. But it’s getting harder with every new dumpster fire this country unleashes. Fuck 2022. *Front Page Edit. Thank you for all the support. And if you’re having heart issues, I implore you to get it checked. You only have one heart.
item.dc:creator: wolfymedic1337

item.title: Ah yes - high school
item.description: Same goes for any student who dreams of a college athletic scholarship. The coach decides who plays and who warms the bench. Don't play and the scouts don't see you. Goodbye scholarship.
